mapper.select:
SELECT c.care_number, c.care_title, c.care_date, u.user_nickname, c.care_write_date FROM DDD_CARE c JOIN ddd_user u ON c.user_number = u.user_number WHERE c.care_status IN ('open','close')
ORDER BY c.care_date DESC;

SELECT c.care_number, c.care_title, c.care_post, c.care_date, c.care_recruit, u.user_nickname, c.care_write_date, COUNT(a.apply_number) AS apply_count FROM DDD_CARE c JOIN DDD_USER u ON c.user_number = u.user_number LEFT JOIN DDD_CARE_APPLY a ON c.care_number = a.care_number WHERE c.care_number = #{careNumber} AND c.care_status IN ('open','close') GROUP BY c.care_number, c.care_title, c.care_post, c.care_date, c.care_recruit, u.user_nickname, c.care_write_date
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DDD_CARE(care_number, user_number, care_title, care_post, care_date, care_recruit, care_write_date, care_status) VALUES(seq_care.NEXTVAL, #{userNumber}, #{careTitle}, #{carePost}, #{careDate}, #{careRecruit}, SYSDATE, 'open')

INSERT INTO ddd_care_apply(apply_number, care_number, user_number, apply_date) SELECT SEQ_CARE_APPLY.NEXTVAL, #{careNumber}, #{userNumber}, SYSDATE FROM DDD_CARE c WHERE c.care_number = #{careNumber} AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ddd_care_apply WHERE care_number = c.care_number) < c.care_recruit AND c.care_status = 'open'
mapper.update: UPDATE ddd_care c SET c.care_status = 'close' WHERE c.care_number = #{careNumber} AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ddd_care_apply a WHERE a.care_number = c.care_number) >= c.care_recruit
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ddd_care_apply WHERE care_number = #{careNumber} AND user_number = #{userNumber}
mapper.select: SELECT a.apply_number, u.user_number, u.user_name, u.user_nickname, u.user_phone FROM ddd_care_apply a JOIN ddd_user u ON a.user_number = u.user_number WHERE a.care_number = #{careNumber}
